Also note that candidate_task_profile_linked is needed for confirm_candidate_preparedness. So attach first.

Similarly for destination.

Assemble_transport_leg requires both locked and confirmed and nodes ready. After unload, origin is locked and confirmed and node ready. Destination after unload also locked, confirmed, node ready. So assemble works.

Execute origin dispatch: requires dispatch_allocated (just set), candidate_vehicle_linked (to vehicle_unit_alpha), candidate_dispatch_slot_linked (just set), not dispatched. Works. Frees vehicle and slot.

Allocate dispatch slot for destination: requires dispatch_ready destination (we marked), candidate_task_profile_linked (yes), dispatch_slot_available (now free again), not dispatch_allocated. Works.
